dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6285 IH: Native Arts and Culture Promotion Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Tokuda (for herself and Mr. Case) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Education and Workforce

form.official-title: To amend the American Indian, Alaska Native, and Native Hawaiian Culture and Art Development Act.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Native Arts and Culture Promotion Act.

section.header: Amendments to American Indian, Alaska Native, and Native Hawaiian Culture and Art Development Act
section.text: Section 1521 of the American Indian, Alaska Native, and Native Hawaiian Culture and Art Development Act (20 U.S.C. 4441) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subsection (a), by striking private,; and

subparagraph.text: by amending paragraph (2) to read as follows:

paragraph.text: For any grants made with respect to Native Hawaiian art and culture, the members of the governing board which is required to be established under paragraph (1) shall—

subparagraph.text: include Native Hawaiians and individuals widely recognized in the field of Native Hawaiian art and culture, and

clause.text: in subparagraph (A), striking the comma at the end and inserting , and;
